8086.one_line_summary: Privacy-preserving fungible token interface using zero-knowledge proofs for confidential transfers.
8086.notes: Foundational privacy layer for wrapper protocols and dual-mode tokens; defines IZRC20 interface with commitment-based transfers.

8092.one_line_summary: Standard for establishing and verifying associations between blockchain accounts with signature support.
8092.notes: Uses EIP-712 for signatures, supports EIP-1271 contract validation; enables sub-account identity inheritance and delegation.

8100.one_line_summary: XML template interface for contracts to expose canonical state representation without gas cost.
8100.notes: Off-chain rendering via XML bindings; supports versioned and hashed state extensions; includes optional partial view interface.

8106.one_line_summary: Event-driven compliance framework for RWA tokens with entity classification and audit events.
8106.notes: Distinguishes Compliance Entities from Decentralized Entities; soft policy flags via events without enforcement reverts.

8107.one_line_summary: Web of trust validation registry using ENS names for multi-party agent coordination.
8107.notes: GnuPG-style trust model; four trust levels; integrates with ERC-8001 coordination hooks; requires EIP-712 signatures.

8109.one_line_summary: Simplified diamond proxy architecture with standardized introspection functions and per-function events.
8109.notes: Withdrawal reason: Superseded by EIP-8153; refinement of ERC-2535 with simpler terminology and events.

8110.one_line_summary: Domain architecture pattern for Diamond storage organization using ERC-8042 identifiers.
8110.notes: Separates storage ownership from facet logic; defines domain naming conventions and upgrade scenarios; fully backward-compatible.

8111.one_line_summary: Compressed ECDSA signatures binding y-parity to reduce size and eliminate malleability.
8111.notes: Reduces 96-byte signatures to 64 bytes; restricts v to 27 for non-malleable signatures; valid with ecrecover.

8113.one_line_summary: Series Accounting method for collecting performance fees in ERC-7540 async vaults.
8113.notes: Solves free-rider problem in yield vaults; maintains independent series with unique highwater marks; consolidation mechanism.

8117.one_line_summary: Display format for addresses with leading zeros using subscript or parenthesis notation to prevent poisoning.
8117.notes: Subscript (0x0₈) for UI, parenthesis (0x0(8)) for ASCII; threshold n≥4; improves security of gas-optimized addresses.

8119.one_line_summary: Standard formats for parameterized string keys in EVM key-value storage.
8119.notes: Supports slash/colon form (single param) and bracket form (multiple params); ASCII label restrictions; UTF-8 parameters.

8121.one_line_summary: Hooks for cross-chain function calls with ERC-7930 addresses enabling ERC-3668 resolution.
8121.notes: Fully specifies function calls across chains; includes optional selector for type safety; supports read and write operations.

8122.one_line_summary: Minimal gas-efficient registry for discovering AI agents using ERC-6909.
8122.notes: Agents as tokens with single owners; onchain metadata via ERC-8048; supports custom deployments beyond singleton models.

8126.one_line_summary: Multi-layer AI agent verification (ETV, MCV, SCV, WAV, WV) with unified risk scoring.
8126.notes: Privacy-first via ZKPs; 0-100 risk score; integrates with ERC-8004; optional quantum cryptography support (QCV).

8127.one_line_summary: Human-readable token identifiers combining optional alias, token ID, and ERC-7930 registry address.
8127.notes: Format: [alias.]token-id@registry; enables usable naming for NFTs, RWAs, agents; portable across systems.
